sourceMovie.title: Our Brand Is Crisis
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Our Brand Is Crisis works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Casanova
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Our Brand Is Crisis clicked for you, Casanova (2005) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Our Brand Is Crisis?
faq.answer: Try Casanova, Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid, Romancing the Stone—each shares DNA with Our Brand Is Crisis while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Our Brand Is Crisis?
faq.answer: Our Brand Is Crisis (2015) is best described as Comedy, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Our Brand Is Crisis worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
